maine_authorization_date.description: Date the foreign nonprofit corporation was originally authorized to carry on activities in Maine. Required on amendment forms (MNPCA-12A, MBCA-12A class) so SOS can locate the original authorization record.

home_jurisdiction_name_new.description: New corporate name in the home jurisdiction when the entity has changed its name in its home state. Counterpart to `entity.home_jurisdiction_name` (the current/original name); both may be present on amendment forms.

name_change_date_in_home_jurisdiction.description: Date the name change was effected in the home jurisdiction (paired with entity.home_jurisdiction_name_new).

maine_business_purpose.description: Description of the activities the foreign nonprofit seeks to pursue in Maine, authorized by the laws of its home jurisdiction.

physical_address.description: Address of the entity's registered or principal office in its home jurisdiction (wherever located). Distinct from `registered_agent.physical_address` which is the Maine-side registered office.

description.description: Free-text description of an amendment being filed against an existing record. Distinct from `entity.*` fields that describe the entity as it exists post-amendment — `amendment.description` describes the *change itself*.

fict4_accompanies.description: Boolean indicating Form FICT-4 (fictitious-name registration) is bundled with this filing. Required when a fictitious name is used because the home name is unavailable in Maine.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
